accounts.name: personhood_attestation
docs: Personhood attestation for the bidder's operator wallet. Required iff the
task payload declares a non-None `requires_personhood`, or if the tag
carries a non-zero `min_personhood_tier`. Left optional so tasks without
a personhood floor don't force the extra account.

accounts.name: capability_tag
docs: CapabilityTag pinned to the bid's capability bit. Required iff the tag
has min_personhood_tier > 0. The tag's owning program is validated in

accounts.name: guard
docs: task_market's own reentrancy guard — asserted + held across the CPI.

accounts.name: verifier_self_guard
docs: proof_verifier's self_guard PDA. Threaded into the CPI.

accounts.name: verifier_allowed_callers
docs: proof_verifier's allowed_callers PDA. Threaded into the CPI.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: signer is not authorized for this instruction

errors.name: InvalidDeadline
errors.msg: deadline must be in the future

errors.name: WrongStatus
errors.msg: task is in the wrong status for this instruction

errors.name: CallerNotOperator
errors.msg: signer is not the operator of the assigned agent

errors.name: AgentMismatch
errors.msg: agent DID does not match task assignment

errors.name: PhaseClosed
errors.msg: bid phase closed for this action

errors.name: RevealMismatch
errors.msg: revealed bid does not match commit hash

errors.name: BondOutOfRange
errors.msg: bond bps out of allowed range

errors.name: BidBookNotSettled
errors.msg: bid book has not been settled

errors.name: NotWinner
errors.msg: signer is not the winning bidder

errors.name: NoReveals
errors.msg: no eligible reveals in bid book

errors.name: BidBookAlreadyOpen
errors.msg: task already has an open bid book

errors.name: CommitsPresent
errors.msg: bid book has active commits; cannot cancel

errors.name: UnknownCapability
errors.msg: agent does not advertise the requested capability_bit

errors.name: AttestationOperatorMismatch
errors.msg: attestation operator does not match bidder

errors.name: HookNotAllowed
errors.msg: transfer-hook program not on fee_collector allowlist

errors.name: MintExtensionRejected
errors.msg: mint extension configuration is not acceptable

errors.name: HookAllowlistMismatch
errors.msg: hook_allowlist account does not match MarketGlobal hook_allowlist

errors.name: ReentrancyDetected
errors.msg: reentrancy detected — guard is already active

errors.name: UnauthorizedCaller
errors.msg: caller program is not on the allowed callers list

errors.name: CallerGuardNotActive
errors.msg: caller program's reentrancy guard is not active

errors.name: CpiDepthExceeded
errors.msg: cpi stack height exceeds allowed bound

errors.name: GuardNotInitialized
errors.msg: reentrancy guard has not been initialized

errors.name: AdminResetNotTimelocked
errors.msg: admin reset has not met the 24h timelock
